tool.name: Google Search
tool.description: Grounds responses with real-time web search results for factual accuracy.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Google Search
Use Google Search to find real-time information, verify facts, and answer questions about current events.

**Capabilities:**
- Web search retrieval
- Fact verification
- Citation generation

**Usage:**
Enabled via tool configuration. The model will invoke it automatically when it needs external information.
